name: [ACCOUNT-17/19/20/21/22/24/25/26/27 + QA-09/12] Add deterministic consent handoff coverage
description: Consent invite, mailbox/deep-link, regional, resend/retry, withdraw, deny, and post-approval branches remain partially verified because live email/provider events were not available in the Chrome sweep.
acceptanceCriteria: Add deterministic coverage and/or seed helpers for ACCOUNT-17, ACCOUNT-19, ACCOUNT-20, ACCOUNT-21, ACCOUNT-22, ACCOUNT-24, ACCOUNT-25, ACCOUNT-26, ACCOUNT-27, QA-09, and QA-12. Cover child memory consent prompt parent handoff/resume; underage consent invite creation; child-to-parent /consent phases; parent email entry/resend/change-email; PENDING vs REQUESTED waiting UI; post-approval landing; withdraw confirmation and restore path; regional variants; deny confirmation; invalid/expired consent URL handling; and generated consent email URL shape. The proof must not require a real mailbox in routine CI/browser runs. Update flow-plan rows with evidence and explicitly leave only true SMTP/provider-delivery behavior as Blocked.
riskImpact: P1 consent-flow coverage gap: underage consent and parent handoff are primary family-account flows. If the invite, email URL, resend/change email, deny, withdraw, or post-approval branches regress, minors and guardians can be blocked from account use or left in the wrong consent state.
